SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.overpressure

Class OverpressureProtectionStudy

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.overpressure.OverpressureProtectionStudy
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class OverpressureProtectionStudy extends Object implements Serializable
Aggregates the credible overpressure relief scenarios for a protected item, selects the governing (worst-case) scenario, sizes the pressure relief device for that case and checks the accumulated-pressure acceptance limit.

This is the TR3001 section 4.6-4.7 relief-scenario engine: each credible cause (blocked outlet, check-valve leakage, gas/liquid blow-by, control-valve failure, tube rupture, fire, etc.) is added as a ReliefScenario, and the study determines the governing case by the largest credible required relief rate (API STD 521 section 4.4). The pressure relief device is sized for the governing vapour case using ReliefValveSizing, and the result is checked against the ASME VIII Div 1 / TR3001 section 2 accumulated-pressure limits.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    OverpressureProtectionStudy
    setMultipleDevices(boolean multipleDevices)
    Sets whether more than one relief device protects the item, which raises the non-fire accumulated-pressure limit from 110% to 116% of MAWP.

  • Constructor Details

    • OverpressureProtectionStudy

      public OverpressureProtectionStudy(ProtectedItem item)
      Creates an overpressure protection study for a protected item.
      Parameters:
      item - the protected item; not null

  • Method Details

    • addScenario

      public OverpressureProtectionStudy addScenario(ReliefScenario scenario)
      Adds a relief scenario to the study.
      Parameters:
      scenario - the relief scenario; not null
      Returns:
      this study for chaining

    • setMultipleDevices

      public OverpressureProtectionStudy setMultipleDevices(boolean multipleDevices)
      Sets whether more than one relief device protects the item, which raises the non-fire accumulated-pressure limit from 110% to 116% of MAWP.
      Parameters:
      multipleDevices - true if multiple relief devices protect the item
      Returns:
      this study for chaining

    • getItem

      public ProtectedItem getItem()
      Gets the protected item.
      Returns:
      the protected item

    • getScenarios

      public List<ReliefScenario> getScenarios()
      Gets the documented relief scenarios.
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of scenarios

    • governingScenario

      public ReliefScenario governingScenario()
      Determines the governing relief scenario as the credible scenario with the largest required relief rate.
      Returns:
      the governing scenario, or null when no credible scenario exists

    • evaluate

      public OverpressureStudyResult evaluate()
      Evaluates the study: selects the governing case, sizes the relief device for the governing vapour case and checks the accumulated-pressure acceptance limit.
      Returns:
      the OverpressureStudyResult
